_comment: Template ONLY. Copy this file to appsettings.Production.json OR — preferred for secrets — set the equivalent env vars on the target host. See DEPLOY.md 'Setting production secrets'.

ConnectionStrings._comment: Azure SQL Database (round-ACA-1.17 onwards). Replace YOUR_SERVER / YOUR_USER / YOUR_PASSWORD with the real values, OR (preferred) set the ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection env var on the Container App and leave this sample as documentation only.

Email._comment_smtp: Pick ONE provider, paste the values. Both SendGrid and Brevo free tiers work.

_comment_sendgrid.notes: Password = the API key string from SendGrid Settings → API Keys. User is literally 'apikey'.

_comment_brevo.notes: Password = the SMTP key from Brevo → SMTP & API → Generate. Verify the sender email in Brevo first.

Backup._comment_vacuum_into: VACUUM INTO snapshots the SQLite db on the periodic timer. Directory defaults to <contentRoot>/backups — explicit override is REQUIRED on Azure App Service Linux so backups don't land next to the publish artifacts (or in wwwroot).
